static_signals.memo_on_grid: AssignmentGridView wrapped in React.memo — single-slot updates don't re-render siblings.
static_signals.css_grid_layout: grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0,1fr)) — browser handles layout; no React re-position.
static_signals.lazy_images: slot — layout stable, network opportunistic.
static_signals.no_subscriptions_v1: realtime publish is no-op; clients use router.refresh() — zero long-running JS.
